name: Karanpal Singh
fullRole: B.Tech Computer Engineering Student | Full-Stack Developer | ML Enthusiast
headline: Building scalable web applications, Web3 products, and practical machine learning solutions.
intro: I am a B.Tech Computer Engineering student at B K Birla Institute of Engineering and Technology, Pilani. I focus on full-stack web development, Web3, and machine learning, with an interest in building lightweight, efficient, and user-friendly products.
about: I am a Computer Engineering student focused on practical software engineering, scalable systems, and clean user experiences. I enjoy turning ideas into real products using modern web technologies, Web3 workflows, and machine learning.
aboutExtended: My recent work includes crowdfunding products, full-stack web applications, and machine learning projects built to be lightweight, useful, and technically strong.

education.institution: B K Birla Institute of Engineering and Technology, Pilani

projects.title: Fundify Campus
projects.description: A zero-fee decentralized crowdfunding platform built for campus innovators using the MERN stack and Algorand blockchain.
highlights: Integrated Pera Wallet and algosdk for secure peer-to-peer contributions
Built automated refund workflow using node-cron for expired campaigns

projects.title: Send Me a Chai
projects.description: A crowdfunding platform that enables smooth supporter interactions and online contributions.
highlights: Added Razorpay payments, real-time notifications, and dashboard
Implemented secure profiles and personalized supporter messaging

projects.title: CardioPredict
projects.description: A machine learning project for predicting heart attack risk levels using clinical health indicators.

experience.description: Strengthened problem-solving and procedural programming skills through structured assignments and practical exercises.
Worked on outreach strategies, donor engagement, and campaign promotion to improve participation.

achievements: ACE Hack 5.0 Winner - Built Fundify Campus, a decentralized crowdfunding platform
Solved 200+ DSA Problems across LeetCode, Codeforces, CodeChef, and HackerRank
Active GitHub Contributor with 300+ contributions and consistent coding practice
